title: Verification,
content: Authentication or Attestation of Documents of 29 Principals/Employers. The verification, authentication, or attestation of documents of 30 seabased principals shall be governed by the following: 31 32 a. All documents for accreditation shall be subject to verification by the MWO in the 33 principal’s place of business, or in the MWO which has concurrent jurisdiction, to 34 determine the existence of the employing person or company and its capability 35 to hire seafarers, prior to accreditation with the Department. 36 37 b. In the absence of both an MWO in the country where the principal’s/employer’s 38 place of business is located or an MWO which has concurrent jurisdiction, the 39 documents shall be submitted to the nearest Philippine Embassy/Consulate for 40 authentication. 41 42 In the case of Apostilled documents, the same shall be acknowledged by the 43 Philippine Embassy or Consulate which has jurisdiction over the principal’s place 44 of business. 45 46 c. In cases where; (a) there is no MWO in the country where the 47 principal’s/employer’s principal place of business is located, no MWO which has 48 concurrent jurisdiction, and no Philippine Embassy or Consulate at the principal’s 49 place of business; or (b) in other cases as may be determined or approved by 50 the Department, authorized officials/representatives of both the 51 principal/employer and its LMA shall submit the documents and personally 52 appear before the Department for attestation. 53 54 The manning agreement and special power of attorney may be signed by the 55 authorized officials of both the hiring company and its local manning agency in 56 the presence of any official authorized by the Department for attestation, in lieu 57 of verification or authentication of employment documents. 58 59 The Department shall charge attestation fees, as may be allowed by the 60 Secretary, and upon prior approval of the Department of Finance (DOF) and 61 other concerned agencies. 62 30 The Department shall develop a borderless verification system with the MWOs for a 1 digitalized and seamless process to accomplish its mandate to achieve ease of doing 2 business. 3 4
